reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia. Cargue nafta en varias ocaciones y presente la serviclub para cargar km... a los días me aparece usado el beneficio de cambio pesos/kilómetros al frente de esta estación.  A la queja conocen el tema pero no hacen nada. Unos miserables totales, y x 100 pesos

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience. I filled up with gas several times and used my Serviclub card to add kilometers... a few days later, the peso/kilometer exchange benefit appeared as used at this station. When I complained, they were aware of the issue but did nothing. Completely unfair, and for 100 pesos...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDemVHMjBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención los baños solo estaban habilitados de discapacitados y nada recomendable bastante descuidados los instó a qué mejoren eso shopp cerrado

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but the restrooms were only accessible for disabled people and not recommended at all; they were quite neglected. I urge them to improve that. The shop is closed.
